CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Off Calendar

Compromise Of Person With A Disability.
Off Calendar Nov-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Scott Righthand, Esq. for Petitioner: Pedro Martinez, present as Guardian at litem for: Pedro de Jesus Martinez Sanchez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
Mrs. Sanchez also present in court.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $210,172.47
Medical Lien $35,569.05
Costs $76,627.89
The remaining proceeds to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Attachmen 7(b)2(c).
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
